message:
🌱 Add knative-eventing: Prototype a MQTT Source mission (#1489)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "knative-eventing-7207-prototype-a-mqtt-source",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "knative-eventing: Prototype a MQTT Source",
+    "description": "Prototype a MQTT Source. Requested by 9+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current knative-eventing deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your knative-eventing version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n knative-eventing -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative-eventing\nhelm list -n knative-eventing 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working knative-eventing installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review knative-eventing configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant knative-eventing configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n knative-eventing -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative-eventing\nkubectl get configmap -n knative-eventing -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=knative-eventing\n```\n**Problem**\n\nWe do not have a `MQTT Source` in Knative Eventing, for transforming messages from MQTT brokers to Cloudevents and ingest them via HTTP into the Knative Eventing system."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Prototype a MQTT Source",
+        "description": "As you described the process that you tested [cloud-event's sample MQTT receiver](https://github.com/cloudevents/sdk-go/tree/1ed9471c98bdf49bcc1ffe74980c15691beb749f/samples/mqtt/receiver):\n> Copy the file main.go in folder receiver, installing all packages\n> 1. Start a MQTT broker as they\n```yaml\n------------------ PUBLISH -------------------\n\nTopic Name: mytopic\nContent Type: application/cloudevents+json; charset=utf-8\n\n------------------ payload -------------------\n\n{\n    \"specversion\" : \"1.0\",\n    \"type\" : \"com.example.someevent\",\n\t\"time\" : 2018-04-05T03:56;24Z,\n\t\"id\" : 1234-1234-1234,\n\t\"source\" : \"/mycontext/subcontext\",\n\t\"datacontenttype\" : \"application/json; charset=utf-8\",\n\n    ... further attributes omitted ...\n\n    \"data\" : {\n        ... application data ...\n    }\n}\n\n-----------------------------------------------\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n knative-eventing -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative-eventing\nkubectl get events -n knative-eventing --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Prototype a MQTT Source\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "As you described the process that you tested [cloud-event's sample MQTT receiver](https://github.com/cloudevents/sdk-go/tree/1ed9471c98bdf49bcc1ffe74980c15691beb749f/samples/mqtt/receiver):\n> Copy the file main.go in folder receiver, installing all packages\n> 1.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "------------------ PUBLISH -------------------\n\nTopic Name: mytopic\nContent Type: application/cloudevents+json; charset=utf-8\n\n------------------ payload -------------------\n\n{\n    \"specversion\" : \"1.0\",\n    \"type\" : \"com.example.someevent\",\n\t\"time\" : 2018-04-05T03:56;24Z,\n\t\"id\" : 1234-1234-1234,\n\t\"source\" : \"/mycontext/subcontext\",\n\t\"datacontenttype\" : \"application/json; charset=utf-8\",\n\n    ... further attributes omitted ...\n\n    \"data\" : {\n        ... application data ...\n    }\n}\n\n-----------------------------------------------",
+        "mosquitto_pub -t 'test/topic' -m '{\"specversion\" : \"1.0\",\"type\" :\"com.example.someevent\",\"id\" : \"1234-1234-1234\",\"source\" : \"/mycontext/subcontext\",\"data\":{\"msg\":\"hello world!\"}}' -D PUBLISH user-property Content-Type application/cloudevents+json; charset=utf-8"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "knative-eventing",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "knative-eventing"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/knative/eventing/issues/7207",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/knative/eventing"
+    },
+    "reactions": 9,
+    "comments": 23,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with knative-eventing installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-19T06:26:36.152Z",
